gt_sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.ID) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Examination AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', T2.`Examination Date`) BETWEEN '1990' AND '1993' AND STRFTIME('%Y', T2.`Examination Date`) - STRFTIME('%Y', T1.Birthday) < 18
pred_sql:
SELECT COUNT(T1.ID) 
FROM Patient AS T1 
INNER JOIN Examination AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID 
WHERE strftime('%Y', T2."Examination Date") BETWEEN '1990' AND '1993' 
AND CAST(strftime('%Y', T2."Examination Date") AS INTEGER) - CAST(strftime('%Y', T1.Birthday) AS INTEGER) < 18
question: How many underage patients were examined during the course of the three-year period from 1990 to 1993?
